nasb.text: ‘Also if one person sins unintentionally, then he shall offer a one year old female goat for a sin offering.

esv.text: “If one person sins unintentionally, he shall offer a female goat a year old for a sin offering.

cnv.text: “如果一個人誤犯了罪，他就要獻一隻一歲的母山羊作贖罪祭。

ccb.text: “倘若是个人无意间犯了罪，他就要献上一只一岁的母山羊作赎罪祭。
